textByHashes.4b21811b45c121b1501fc00d2619608ac9927335: These crates are heavy! I could do with some help if that's what you're here for.
textByHashes.a68bc2c2bc2c18e9308a4ba4b9aad6f8f347645e: Many of us disagree with the king about what freedoms the local monster population should have. We're taking a stand and mobilising our forces against the monstrous hordes.
textByHashes.dc28c3274b7bd5ce5483c74da09fba6eb2e37e5f: I'm totally in awe of Johanhus, he really knows what's what. I know he keeps going on about monsters and it's clear there are too many of them, so hey, I agree with whatever Johanhus says.
textByHashes.04e3aa886e77e62bc35da5349f88d1a5d1d06fde: We're against the monsters..like Johanhus says...we don't like them...you know.
textByHashes.6c470a111ca6a404ecac2fe4a442a8557226a47a: I'm a strong believer in the non-monsters policy...we should really get rid of them...and if that means I have to live in a cave like a monster, so be it!
textByHashes.9b2ce4890455c063fc25ddea560185ab62c0fed9: We want a world without monsters, to live in safety and without fear of being attacked by these ferocious beasts.
textByHashes.f0f64cec7d90a2f5dbef62aba50e16bdfd954e28: That's not enough, we want to get rid of them totally, we want to enjoy the surrounding lands and not worry about our children playing in caves and so on.
textByHashes.748d64af6acd1969b3cc74e25c931d593f017d76: Most of us came from small towns that had been attacked by monsters. We all got fed up with it and so decided to join this movement. We're hoping to return to the towns and cities when we've cleaned up the areas
textByHashes.5f0ea728dc99d4c70b651d8ee97eca62d2acb2df: We deal harshly with thieves around here!
textByHashes.b6c80781491679d704f2572a1ed6b7b7749511b6: What do you think you're doing?
